name: omnimatch
description: Manage your Omnimatch account via MCP. Browse markets and entities; view matches through inboxes (priority, liked, all, and your own inbox filters); like / reject / respond / unlock matches; share contact details; manage inbox filters with a free-text prompt and strictness; update profile criteria with text; view and change subscription plans (Stripe billing portal). Connects to the Omnimatch MCP server (authenticated user).
